Short CV

Born in Konya, 1987, She finished her primary, middle and high school education in here. She completed her undergraduate education at Hacettepe University Physical Therapy and Rehabilitation Department in 2009. Then she started her postgraduate education in Cardiopulmonary Rehabilitation of the same university. In 2013, she completed her thesis on “Comparison of Functional Status in Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease in Different Phenotyping” and received her scientific expertise. She is currently a PhD candidate at Hacettepe University, Department of Cardiopulmonary Rehabilitation.
